query: SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.paymentStatus, o.orderStatus, COUNT(oi.id) as itemCount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.orderId GROUP BY o.id ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.paymentStatus, o.orderStatus, COUNT(oi.id) as itemCount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.orderId GROUP BY o.id ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 5;
